title: Delicate Light Tunisian Whole Wheat Paella
description: A fragrant, light paella dish from Tunisia, using whole wheat and infused oil for added flavor, perfect for a special occasion.

ingredients.name: Infused Olive Oil (e.g. Lemon and Herb)
Turkish Red Lentils (or any small red or green lentils)

instructions: Heat the extra virgin olive oil in a large kadhai over medium heat.
Add the infused olive oil, and cook for 1 minute, allowing the flavors to meld.
Add the diced chicken and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the cubed bell peppers and diced zucchini, and cook for an additional 3 minutes.
Add the smoked paprika, sea salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the whole wheat paella rice, and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the chicken broth, and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20 minutes, or until the liquid is absorbed and the rice is tender.
Fluff the paella with a fork, and stir in the chopped parsley, dried thyme, and freshly squeezed lemon juice.
Serve hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
Let the paella rest for 5 minutes before serving to allow the flavors to meld together.
